LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 06/21/04. RULING: DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO IDENTIFY ANY STATUTE THAT PLACES AN ACTIONABLE AND MANDATORY DUTY ON THE PART OF THE DISTRICT. THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED AS TO THE SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT AND A JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL WILL BE ENTERED FORTHWITH. (301/JLW/)
